title: Teltonika DAP142 - Industrial Wireless Access Point
description: The DAP142 is a Teltonika industrial wireless access point with passive PoE-in, designed to enhance Wi-Fi coverage and performance in industrial environments. Featuring Wi-Fi 4 with Wi-Fi mesh and Fast Roaming, as well as dual RJ45, RS232 ports and support of up to 50 simultaneous connections, this wireless access point is integral in maintaining reliable connectivity. An integrated DIN rail bracket, 3-pin power connector, and industrial-grade aluminium housing make the DAP142 the ideal access… WIRELESS AP CAPABILITIES - Seamless Wi-Fi 4 with Wi-Fi mesh & Fast Roaming INTERFACES - 2x 10/100 RJ45 and RS232 port POWER INPUT - 1x 3-pin power connector tailored for industrial use INTEGRATED DIN RAIL BRACKET - Easy mounting for plug-and-play deployment Device 3-pin power connector QSG (Quick Start Guide)
specsSearch: Wireless features WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11b/g Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors (1) RSMA female LAN speed (2) 10/100Mbps Serial port RS-232 Power Power via connector/terminal 9 .. 30V DC Physical characteristics LED indication Yes Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 149 Width [mm] 113 Height [mm] 25 Depth [mm] 69 Hardware CPU Mediatek, 580 Mhz, MIPS 24KEc Internal storage [MB] 16 RAM [MB] 128
